metadata.description: The dev team that works while you're away — an autonomous-development toolkit for Claude Code: ticket-to-PR pipeline, multi-agent review, elicitation/intake surface, design fidelity, and session auditing. Generic tooling only; each consumer repo supplies static context (one config file) and dynamic context (repo-local knowledge skills).

plugins.name: dev-pipeline
plugins.description: Autonomous ticket → intake → plan → implement → verify → review → PR pipeline with crash-recoverable state, deterministic verify runner, and tracker adapters (github|jira).

plugins.name: review-toolkit
plugins.description: Multi-agent parallel code review: review-lead orchestration, reviewer-baseline protocol, and the generic reviewer panel.

plugins.name: intake-toolkit
plugins.description: Elicitation surface: intake front door, intake-interviewer, intake-orchestrator, plan-interview with Decision Ledger, grill-me, decomposition/spec reviewers.

plugins.name: design-toolkit
plugins.description: Design-fidelity toolkit: design-faithful translation/review skills and agents, with a config-selected design provider (figma or claude-design).

plugins.name: audit-toolkit
plugins.description: Session tool-call audit ledger: audit hooks, /audit and /audit-history query skills, self-tests.

plugins.name: second-shift
plugins.description: Onboarding + health for this marketplace: provenance-first /second-shift:onboard (writes consumer config, settings pin, lockfile) and /second-shift:doctor (install-state verification). Install at user scope; it bootstraps everything else.
